'''Prard'enc'iflar''' was an officer in the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]], and a relative of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Prard'ras'kleoni|Drask]]. He was tall, with white-streaked hair.

In [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], he was the [[Commander/Legends#Other_systems|commander]] of the [[Brask Oto Command Station]] in [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]], and thus conducted the defense of the station against the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] first-strike attack in that year. The defenses of the command station badly damaged the [[Paskla-class cruiser|Vagaari carrier]], but the defending Chiss starfighters were being overwhelmed by enemy squadrons until the tide was turned by the arrival of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]].

Commander Prard'enc'iflar survived the battle, and was the officer to whom the Jedi Skywalkers subsequently revealed the coordinates of the Vagaari fleet rendezvous.
